news.headline: French nationals leave Iran after more than three years in detention
news.summary: Two French nationals, who spent more than three years in an Iranian prison on espionage charges, headed home from the war-stricken country on Tuesday, President Emmanuel Macron said. news.headline: Shelly Kittleson, American Journalist Abducted in Iraq, Is Freed
news.summary: The journalist, Shelly Kittleson, was abducted by a militia allied with Iran and held for a week. Iraqi officials say she was freed in exchange for the release of militia members.
